trigger.Name: Karavan_cin
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("QuietDialogue01")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("Karavan_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 20, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic() UpdateCinematic(1)
AddCinematicMessage( 0, 3 ) AddCinematicMessage( 1, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 2, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 3, 0.5 )
TActivate("Karavan_cin_vehicle") TActivate( "Karavan_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Karavan_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("QuietDialogue01")
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(267.202, 346.239, 130.364)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.001, 0.356, -0.004, 0.934)) vehPlayer:SetExternalPathByName("Player_path") vehPlayer:LimitMaxSpeed(15) end
CreateVehicleEx("CoolBelaz_3","KaravanCar1", CVector(283.297, 345.772, 98.478), 1024) CreateVehicleEx("Ural03","KaravanCar2", CVector(257.990, 345.914, 76.952), 1024) CreateVehicleEx("MirotvorecShot_2","KaravanCar3", CVector(207.369, 346.556, 157.792), 1024) CreateVehicleEx("Cruiser02","KaravanCar4", CVector(195.555, 346.700, 120.951), 1024) CreateVehicleEx("Cruiser01","KaravanCar5", CVector(156.398, 347.212, 114.304), 1024)
local VhKr1 = GetEntityByName("KaravanCar1") if VhKr1 then VhKr1:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.005, 0.355, -0.016, 0.935)) VhKr1:SetExternalPathByName("karavan_2_path") VhKr1:SetCruisingSpeed(15) end
local VhKr2 = GetEntityByName("KaravanCar2") if VhKr2 then VhKr2:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.001, 0.477, -0.005, 0.879)) VhKr2:SetExternalPathByName("karavan_2_path") VhKr2:SetCruisingSpeed(15) end
local VhKr3 = GetEntityByName("KaravanCar3") if VhKr3 then VhKr3:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.006, 0.479, -0.019, 0.877)) VhKr3:SetExternalPathByName("karavan_1_path") VhKr3:SetCruisingSpeed(15) end
local VhKr4 = GetEntityByName("KaravanCar4") if VhKr4 then VhKr4:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.000, 0.358, -0.004, 0.934)) VhKr4:SetExternalPathByName("karavan_1_path") VhKr4:SetCruisingSpeed(15) end
local VhKr5 = GetEntityByName("KaravanCar5") if VhKr5 then VhKr5:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.003, 0.601, -0.015, 0.799)) VhKr5:SetExternalPathByName("karavan_1_path") VhKr5:SetCruisingSpeed(15) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Karavan_cin_end
trigger.script:
TakeQuest("doroga_quest")
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetExternalPathByName("Player_path") vehPlayer:PlaceToEndOfPath("Player_path") vehPlayer:UnlimitMaxSpeed() end
local CarKarav1 = GetEntityByName("KaravanCar1") if CarKarav1 then CarKarav1:Remove() end
local CarKarav2 = GetEntityByName("KaravanCar2") if CarKarav2 then CarKarav2:Remove() end
local CarKarav3 = GetEntityByName("KaravanCar3") if CarKarav3 then CarKarav3:Remove() end
local CarKarav4 = GetEntityByName("KaravanCar4") if CarKarav4 then CarKarav4:Remove() end
local CarKarav5 = GetEntityByName("KaravanCar5") if CarKarav5 then CarKarav5:Remove() end
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
TDeactivate( "Karavan_cin_vehicle" )
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Zaval_cin
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("Techno01")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
CreateNewDummyObject( "brick_debris1", "CamTochka", -1, -1, CVector(3263.143, 483.175, 843.902), Quaternion(0, 0, 0, 0), 0)
local Plf = GetPlayerVehicle() local PlfID = GetPlayerVehicleId()
local CToch = GetEntityByName("CamTochka") local CTochID = CToch:GetId()
FlyLinked( "Zaval_cam01", CTochID, 5, 1, 0, PlfID ) Fly("Zaval_cam02", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 17, 0, 1 ) StartCinematic()
TActivate("Zaval_cin_vehicle") TActivate("Zaval_cin_dop_1") TActivate( "Zaval_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Zaval_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetExternalPathByName("Player_2_path") end
CreateVehicleEx("Tractor01","rabochy1", CVector(3233.168, 466.000, 900.140), 1029) CreateVehicleEx("Traktor01","rabochy2", CVector(3229.942, 467.401, 832.647), 1029) CreateVehicleEx("BelazCaravan","rabochy3", CVector(3192.626, 461.819, 831.365), 1029)
local rab1 = GetEntityByName("rabochy1") if rab1 then rab1:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.072, -0.950, -0.007, -0.305)) end
local rab2 = GetEntityByName("rabochy2") if rab2 then rab2:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.014, -0.386, -0.081, -0.919)) end
local rab3 = GetEntityByName("rabochy3") if rab3 then rab3:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.081, 0.995, 0.043, 0.044)) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Zaval_cin_dop_1
trigger.script:
AddCinematicMessage( 4, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 5, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 6, 0.5 )
local Kirpich = GetEntityByName("CamTochka") if Kirpich then Kirpich:Remove() end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Zaval_cin_end
trigger.script:
CompleteQuest("doroga_quest2")
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetExternalPathByName("Player_2_path") vehPlayer:PlaceToEndOfPath("Player_2_path") end
local Kirpich = GetEntityByName("CamTochka") if Kirpich then Kirpich:Remove() end
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
TDeactivate( "Zaval_cin_vehicle" ) TDeactivate( "Zaval_cin_dop_1" )
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
SetWeather(1)
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Fury_CarStoped
trigger.script:
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then
local VehCarFur1 = GetEntityByName("FuryCar3_vehicle_0") if VehCarFur1 then VehCarFur1:Remove() end
CreateVehicleEx("MirotvorecFury01","FuryStop1", CVector(1898.394, 345.854, 853.114), 1066)
local Frab1 = GetEntityByName("FuryStop1") if Frab1 then Frab1:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.000, -0.391, 0.001, 0.920)) Frab1:SetSkin(2) end
end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Boloto_cin
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("Bio02")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("Boloto_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 7, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 7, 1 )
TActivate("Boloto_cin_vehicle") TActivate( "Boloto_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Boloto_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Boloto_cin_end
trigger.script:
CompleteQuest("radar_quest1")
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
PlayCustomMusic("6_proc")
TDeactivate( "Boloto_cin_vehicle" ) TDeactivate( "BOLOTO" ) TDeactivate( "BOLOTO_RETURN" ) TActivate( "BOLOTO_QUEST" ) TActivate( "BOLOTO_QUEST_RETURN" ) TActivate( "Radar_1" ) TActivate( "Radar_2_RETURN" ) TActivate( "Radar_2" ) TActivate( "Radar_3_RETURN" ) TActivate( "Radar_3" ) TActivate( "Radar_4_RETURN" ) TActivate( "Radar_4" ) TActivate( "Radar_5_RETURN" ) TActivate( "Radar_5" ) TActivate( "Radar_6_RETURN" ) TActivate( "Radar_6" ) TActivate( "Radar_7_RETURN" ) TActivate( "Radar_7" ) TActivate( "Radar_8_RETURN" ) TActivate( "Radar_8" ) TActivate( "Radar_9_RETURN" ) TActivate( "Radar_9" ) TActivate( "Radar_10" )
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Radar_1
trigger.script: AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Radar_6" )

trigger.Name: Radar_2_RETURN
trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Radar_6" )
PlayCustomMusic("6_proc")

trigger.Name: Radar_2
trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Radar_19" )
PlayCustomMusic("19_proc")

trigger.Name: Radar_3_RETURN
trigger.script:

PlayCustomMusic("19_proc")

trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Radar_31" )
PlayCustomMusic("31_proc")

trigger.Name: Radar_4_RETURN

AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Radar_31" )
PlayCustomMusic("31_proc")

trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Radar_45" )
PlayCustomMusic("45_proc")

AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Radar_45" )
PlayCustomMusic("45_proc")

AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Radar_60" )

PlayCustomMusic("60_proc")

trigger.Name: Radar_6
trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Radar_72" )
PlayCustomMusic("72_proc")

trigger.Name: Radar_7_RETURN
trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Radar_72" )
PlayCustomMusic("72_proc")

trigger.Name: Radar_7
trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Radar_84" )
PlayCustomMusic("84_proc")

trigger.Name: Radar_8_RETURN
trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Radar_84" )
PlayCustomMusic("84_proc")

trigger.Name: Radar_8
trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Radar_91" )
PlayCustomMusic("91_proc")

trigger.Name: Radar_9_RETURN
trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Radar_91" )
PlayCustomMusic("91_proc")

trigger.Name: Radar_9
trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Radar_97" )
PlayCustomMusic("97_proc")

trigger.Name: Radar_10
trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Radar_100" )
TActivate("Boloto_cin2")

trigger.Name: Boloto_cin2
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue03")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("Boloto_cam02", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 6, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 8, 1 )
TActivate("Boloto_cin2_vehicle") TActivate( "Boloto_cin2_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Boloto_cin2_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Boloto_cin2_end
trigger.script:
CompleteQuest("radar_quest2")
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
TDeactivate( "Boloto_cin2_vehicle" ) TActivate( "BOLOTO" ) TActivate( "BOLOTO_RETURN" ) TDeactivate( "BOLOTO_QUEST" ) TDeactivate( "BOLOTO_QUEST_RETURN" ) TDeactivate( "Radar_1" ) TDeactivate( "Radar_2_RETURN" ) TDeactivate( "Radar_2" ) TDeactivate( "Radar_3_RETURN" ) TDeactivate( "Radar_3" ) TDeactivate( "Radar_4_RETURN" ) TDeactivate( "Radar_4" ) TDeactivate( "Radar_5_RETURN" ) TDeactivate( "Radar_5" ) TDeactivate( "Radar_6_RETURN" ) TDeactivate( "Radar_6" ) TDeactivate( "Radar_7_RETURN" ) TDeactivate( "Radar_7" ) TDeactivate( "Radar_8_RETURN" ) TDeactivate( "Radar_8" ) TDeactivate( "Radar_9_RETURN" ) TDeactivate( "Radar_9" ) TDeactivate( "Radar_10" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Propavshiy_cin
trigger.script:
local BasaTown = GetEntityByName("TownEast5192") if BasaTown then BasaTown:SetOpenGateToPlayer(false) end
TActivate("Propavshiy_cin_act")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Propavshiy_cin_act
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("QuietDialogue01")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("Sever_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 20, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 9, 1 )
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then AddCinematicMessage( 91, 0.5 ) end
AddCinematicMessage( 10, 0.5 )
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then AddCinematicMessage( 910, 0.5 ) end
TActivate("Propavshiy_cin_vehicle") TActivate( "Propavshiy_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Propavshiy_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(1889.718, 346.854, 880.125)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.000, -0.721, -0.000, 0.693)) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Propavshiy_cin_end
trigger.script:
god(0)
local BasaTown = GetEntityByName("TownEast5192") if BasaTown then BasaTown:SetOpenGateToPlayer(true) end
local VehCarFur12 = GetEntityByName("FuryStop1") if VehCarFur12 then VehCarFur12:Remove() end
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then TeamCreate("FuryCar3",1066,CVector(1896.581, 345.857, 848.664),{"MirotvorecFury01"}, nil, 1)
local VehCarFur1 = GetEntityByName("FuryCar3_vehicle_0") if VehCarFur1 then VehCarFur1:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) VehCarFur1:SetThrottle(0) VehCarFur1:SetPosition( CVector(1896.581, 345.857, 848.664)) VehCarFur1:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.001, -0.178, 0.001, 0.984)) VehCarFur1:setImmortalMode(1) VehCarFur1:SetSkin(2) end
local newControllerId = CreateNewObject { prototypeName = "someNPCMotionController", objName = "FURYVEHICLE31" }
local newController = GetEntityByID(newControllerId) local FVehicle = GetEntityByName("FuryCar3_vehicle_0") if FVehicle then newController:setVehicleUnderControl(FVehicle) end end
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
TActivate( "triggerExitToMap13" ) TActivate( "Final_cin_activate" ) TActivate( "Final_cin" )
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Final_cin_activate
trigger.script:
if IsQuestTaken("Bitva_quest4") and not(IsQuestComplete("Bitva_quest4")) then
CompleteQuest("Bitva_quest4")
trigger:Deactivate()
end

trigger.Name: Final_cin
trigger.script:
if IsQuestTaken("Vostok_quest") and not(IsQuestComplete("Vostok_quest")) then
CompleteQuest("Vostok_quest")
PlayCustomMusic("XelMusicEND")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
local Cum1 = GetEntityByName("Kamen1") if Cum1 then Cum1:Remove() end
local Cum2 = GetEntityByName("Kamen2") if Cum2 then Cum2:Remove() end
local Cum3 = GetEntityByName("Kamen3") if Cum3 then Cum3:Remove() end
local Cum4 = GetEntityByName("Kamen4") if Cum4 then Cum4:Remove() end
local Cum5 = GetEntityByName("Kamen5") if Cum5 then Cum5:Remove() end
local Cum6 = GetEntityByName("rabochy1") if Cum6 then Cum6:Remove() end
local Cum7 = GetEntityByName("rabochy2") if Cum7 then Cum7:Remove() end
local Cum8 = GetEntityByName("rabochy3") if Cum8 then Cum8:Remove() end
CreateNewDummyObject( "brick_debris1", "CamTochka", -1, -1, CVector(3147.738, 464.002, 842.152), Quaternion(0, 0, 0, 0), 0)
local Plf = GetPlayerVehicle() local PlfID = GetPlayerVehicleId()
local CToch = GetEntityByName("CamTochka") local CTochID = CToch:GetId()
Fly("EndEP3_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 5, 1, 0 ) Fly("EndEP3_cam02", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 10, 0, 0 ) FlyLinked( "Zaval_cam01", CTochID, 19, 0, 1, PlfID ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 11, 1 )
TActivate("Final_cin_vehicle") TActivate("Final_cin_dop_1") TActivate("Final_cin_dop_2") TActivate( "Final_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()
end

trigger.Name: Final_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Final_cin_dop_1
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(2531.252, 359.061, 691.174)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.003, 0.556, -0.004, 0.831)) vehPlayer:SetExternalPathByName("Player_3_path") end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Final_cin_dop_2
trigger.script:
AddCinematicMessage( 12, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 13, 0.5 )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Final_cin_end
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetExternalPathByName("Player_3_path") vehPlayer:PlaceToEndOfPath("Player_3_path") end
local Kirpich = GetEntityByName("CamTochka") if Kirpich then Kirpich:Remove() end
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
TDeactivate( "Final_cin_vehicle" ) TDeactivate( "Final_cin_dop_1" ) TDeactivate( "Final_cin_dop_2" )
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
PassToMap("r2m1", "FromR1M4", -1 , true)
trigger:Deactivate()
